# =========================
# Unreal Engine
# =========================

# Build folders
Binaries/
DerivedDataCache/
Intermediate/
Saved/

# Visual Studio
.vs/
*.VC.db
*.VC.opendb
*.sln
*.sdf
*.opensdf

# Rider / JetBrains
.idea/
*.sln.iml

# Xcode (Mac)
*.xcworkspace
*.xcuserdata
*.xcuserstate

# Logs
Saved/Logs/
*.log

# Temporary files
*.tmp
*.temp

# OS generated files
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# Crash reports
*.dmp

# Backup files
*.bak
*.backup

# Python (por si usás scripts)
__pycache__/
*.pyc

# Node (si hay tools)
node_modules/

# Environment files (por seguridad)
.env
.env.local

# =========================
# Opcional (activar si querés)
# =========================

# Ignorar archivos de autosave
Saved/Autosaves/

# Ignorar configuraciones locales del editor
Saved/Config/WindowsEditor/

# =========================
# FIN
# =========================
